description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular design. The exterior is predominantly white with large, grid-style windows on both floors, allowing for ample natural light. On one side, there is a covered carport with two parked vehicles, while the opposite side features a patio area with outdoor furniture and a pool. The rear of the house opens to a spacious deck with a shaded pergola and additional seating, suggesting a focus on outdoor living. The window arrangement is mostly symmetrical, and the main entryway is simple, with a flat overhang and no ornate detailing. The overall aesthetic is clean, functional, and contemporary, suitable for an urban neighborhood.
description: A modern, two-story white house with large grid windows, a flat roof, carport, and outdoor living spaces including a patio and pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with large windows, carport on the left, and a covered patio area on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard with a pool, deck, and outdoor seating area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, patio, and pergola, with the carport visible on the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway with two cars and the main entryway.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main entry with a flat overhang, no steps, and minimal decorative elements
